tasks.title: Fill architecture: system-design.md
tasks.context_hints: 3-file architecture: index.html, style.css, script.js. No server.

tasks.title: Fill architecture: tech-stack.md
tasks.context_hints: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, no framework, no build step

tasks.title: Fill architecture: data-model.md
tasks.context_hints: Calculator state: currentOperand, previousOperand, operation, shouldResetDisplay

tasks.title: Fill architecture: api-design.md
tasks.context_hints: JS functions: appendNumber, chooseOperation, compute, clear, deleteDigit, toggleSign, percentage

tasks.title: Fill architecture: roadmap.md
tasks.context_hints: MVP: basic calc. V1: history, themes. V2: scientific mode.

tasks.title: Architecture gate check and advance
tasks.context_hints: Mark all gate checks [x], run dev advance calculator

tasks.title: Build: index.html
tasks.context_hints: Semantic HTML, calculator grid layout, display area, all buttons. Link style.css and script.js.

tasks.title: Build: style.css
tasks.context_hints: Glassmorphism: backdrop-filter blur, semi-transparent backgrounds, soft shadows, gradient background. CSS Grid for buttons. Responsive. Button press animations.

tasks.title: Build: script.js
tasks.context_hints: Calculator class/module: state management, operations, display update, keyboard event listeners. Handle edge cases: divide by zero, chained operations, decimal point.

tasks.title: Test and fix edge cases
tasks.context_hints: Divide by zero, multiple decimals, chained operations (2+3*4), display overflow, negative numbers

tasks.title: Lint and final polish
tasks.context_hints: Validate HTML, check CSS for browser compat, lint JS

tasks.title: Git init, commit, build gate check
tasks.context_hints: git init, git add, commit. Mark build gate checks. No README needed for now.

tasks.title: Push branch and create PR
tasks.context_hints: git push -u origin feat/calculator-website, gh pr create with summary and screenshots
